channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
CW Pothole around ironwork 800mm x 300mm x 43mm Stop and go TM Near junction of Middlehay Court (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 11th May
item.description:
Reset Rocking Kerb 155mm x 125mm x 900mm Give and take TM Outside number 3 (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dead branches in the tree out side my home and also outside number 27. These branches are large and could do a lot of damage to any parked cars or worse to anyone walking underneath if they fell. I feel they should be removed before any chance of them falling occurs., 11th May
item.description:
There are a number of large dead branches in the trees outside numbers 23 and 27 Brooklyn Road These branches are large and could do a lot of damage to any parked cars or worse to anyone walking underneath if they fell. I feel they should be removed before any chance of them falling occurs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 11th May
item.description:
Road closure 28day carriage way edge deteration approx 3000x1200x60mm tarmac parch (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 11th May
item.description:
Remove dead tree leaning into carriageway Give and take TM End of Streamside (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unusable pavement / pothole in pavement, 11th May
item.description:
The whole pavement from Tewkesbury to Coombe hill is a mess. Almost totally impassable and there is a massive hole (pictured)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Priors Park, Tewkesbury, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree lifting pavement and obstructing view for drive coming onto road, 11th May
item.description:
Outside number 31 Ermin Park, Brockworth, GL3 4BD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 11th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please repair x1 chipped kerb stone with concrete fillet 100x220x40mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese Knotweed problem, 11th May
item.description:
Customer is a garden designer and works with the local school. They are reporting Hemlock at these locations. They have not yet seeded and are not cow parsley. There are some poorly dogs in the area who may have eaten it. They are spreading awareness throughout the village and telling children not to play with it.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 11th May
item.description:
PERM - job 43119913, RTC cars caught fire, trees have been damaged and request they are removed before falling carriageway
Report on FixMyStreet
